<?php namespace MailerSend\Helpers\Builder; use MailerSend\Contracts\Arrayable; use MailerSend\Helpers\Arr; class Filter implements Arrayable, \JsonSerializable { protected string $comparer; protected string $value; protected ?string $key; public function __construct(string $comparer, string $value, ?string $key = null) { $this->comparer = $comparer; $this->value = $value; $this->key = $key; } public function toArray(): array { $array = [ 'comparer' => $this->comparer, 'value' => $this->value, ]; if ($this->key) { Arr::set($array, 'key', $this->key); } return $array; } #[\ReturnTypeWillChange] public function jsonSerialize() { return $this->toArray(); } }
